title: T-009 — UI: so_list_page (SHIP-005) (11-shipping-b)
prompt:
# T-009 — SO List page UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-005 (referenced via §15.1 desktop screens), §6 D-SHP-8 status badges, §3 Personas
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-005 — Sales Order List
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/so-screens.jsx:1-139 (so_list_page)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component page `/(shipping)/orders` rendering SO list with status filter, customer filter, date range, sort, and Create button (opens T-008 wizard).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/page.tsx` (RSC) calls Drizzle `listSalesOrders({ status, customerId, dateRange, search })` under `withOrgContext`.
2. Client component renders shadcn `Table` with cols: order_number, customer, promised_ship_date, status (SOStatus badge), holds (HoldChip count), allocation %, total_gbp, last_event_at.
3. Filter row: status multi-select chips (all 12 D-SHP-8 statuses), customer Combobox, date range picker, search input.
4. Create SO button triggers T-008 wizard.
5. Row click → router.push to `/(shipping)/orders/{id}` (T-010 page).
6. Four states (empty/loading/error/permission).
7. Permission gate: `ship.so.create` for Create button, `ship.dashboard.view` for read.
8. i18n keys `shipping.so.list.*` PL/EN.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/so-screens.jsx:1-139` (so_list_page). Verify:
- Page header + Create SO button right-aligned
- Filter row (status chips + customer combobox + date range + search)
- 8-col table (per prototype)
- Pagination footer
- Empty/loading/error states

Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/_components/so-list-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/orders/_components/__tests__/so-list-client.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/en/shipping.json [modify]
- apps/web/messages/pl/shipping.json [modify]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/so-screens.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/so-screens.jsx:1-139, then it has the same header + Create button + filter row + 8-col table + pagination — RTL snapshot + Playwright screenshot.
2. Given URL ?status=confirmed,allocated, when page renders, then only confirmed/allocated SOs appear.
3. Given session has only ship.dashboard.view, when page renders, then Create button is hidden.
4. Given row is clicked, when navigation occurs, then router.push to /(shipping)/orders/{id}.
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + four-state screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL test asserting parity + URL filters + permission gate + row click navigation + four states.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run so-list-client.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-so-list.spec.ts` captures evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not use HTML <select> instead of shadcn primitives.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui.
- Do not regress accessibility.

pipeline_inputs.description: SHIP-005 SO List page matching so_list_page prototype with 8-col table + status/customer/date filters.

out_of_scope: Do not implement Server Actions here (T-007).

Given URL ?status=confirmed,allocated, when page renders, then only confirmed/allocated SOs appear.

Given session has only ship.dashboard.view (no ship.so.create), when page renders, then Create button is hidden; AND given row click, when navigation runs, then router.push to /(shipping)/orders/{id}.
UI closeout includes Playwright trace + four-state screenshots per UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY; Playwright fallback documented if unavailable.
test_strategy: RED: RTL asserting parity + URL filters + permission gate + row click + four states.
